sourceMovie.title: Justice League
sourceMovie.whyPeopleLoveIt: Justice League works as a action movie with a point of view—fans quote moments, but they also argue about what the film is actually saying about power, desire, or survival. The action and adventure blend is the engine: it lets the film shift registers without feeling like two different movies stitched together.

recommendations.title: The Avengers
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Justice League clicked for you, The Avengers (2012) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

recommendations.title: Avengers: Infinity War
recommendations.whyYoullLoveIt: If Justice League clicked for you, Avengers: Infinity War (2018) is a strong next stop: both trade in action and adventure, with momentum and clean stakes. Expect a different story, but a similar willingness to go big when the moment demands it.

faq.question: What should I watch after Justice League?
faq.answer: Try The Avengers, Avengers: Infinity War, Captain America: Civil War—each shares DNA with Justice League while changing the setting enough to feel fresh.

faq.question: What genre is Justice League?
faq.answer: Justice League (2017) is best described as Action, Adventure, Science Fiction. Stores and algorithms use different labels, but that mix is what fans actually recognize on a rewatch.

faq.question: Is Justice League worth revisiting?
faq.answer: Viewer scores sit around 6.1/10 on TMDB—high enough that replays are common for people who like this action lane.
